ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -c option Verbosely describe the action for each file whose group actually changes.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Verbosely describe the action for each file whose group actually changes.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -f option Do not print error messages about files whose group cannot be changed.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Do not print error messages about files whose group cannot be changed.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` --from= option Change a file ’s ownership only if it has current attributes specified by old-owner .
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Change a file ’s ownership only if it has current attributes specified by old-owner .

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` --dereference option Do not act on symbolic links themselves but rather on what they point to.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Do not act on symbolic links themselves but rather on what they point to.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -h option Act on symbolic links themselves instead of what they point to.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Act on symbolic links themselves instead of what they point to.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` --preserve-root option Fail upon any attempt to recursively change the root directory, / .
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Fail upon any attempt to recursively change the root directory, / .

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` --no-preserve-root option Cancel the effect of any preceding --preserve-root option.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Cancel the effect of any preceding --preserve-root option.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` --reference= option Change the group of each file to be the same as that of ref_file .
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Change the group of each file to be the same as that of ref_file .

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -v option Output a diagnostic for every file processed.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Output a diagnostic for every file processed.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -R option Recursively change the group ownership of directories and their contents.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Recursively change the group ownership of directories and their contents.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -H option If --recursive ( -R ) is specified and a command line argument is a symbolic link to a directory, traverse it.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: If --recursive ( -R ) is specified and a command line argument is a symbolic link to a directory, traverse it.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -L option In a recursive traversal, traverse every symbolic link to a directory that is encountered.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: In a recursive traversal, traverse every symbolic link to a directory that is encountered.

ir_specs.statement: The `chgrp invocation` -P option Do not traverse any symbolic links.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Do not traverse any symbolic links.

ir_specs.statement: chgrp changes the group ownership of each given file to group (which can be either a group name or a numeric group ID) or to the group of an existing reference file.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: chgrp changes the group ownership of each given file to group (which can be either a group name or a numeric group ID) or to the group of an existing reference file.

ir_specs.statement: See chown : Change file owner and group .
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: See chown : Change file owner and group .
